description_long: This coatrack features a horizontal black bar with five evenly spaced metallic hooks, designed for hanging coats, hats, and scarves. A brown fedora-style hat and a gray patterned scarf are displayed hanging from the central hook, adding a touch of realism and utility. The hooks are robust and slightly curved, providing secure support for garments and accessories. The main bar appears to be made of metal or painted wood, with a sleek, modern finish that would suit urban environments such as entryways, lobbies, or garages. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on functionality and clean lines. The coatrack is intended to be wall-mounted, maximizing space efficiency in busy urban settings.
description: A modern wall-mounted coatrack with five metallic hooks, featuring a brown hat and gray scarf hanging from the center. The design is minimalist and functional, with a sleek black bar and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the hooks and the way the hat and scarf hang outward from the bar.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five hooks, with the hat and scarf clearly visible on the central hook.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the profile of the hat and scarf, and the thickness of the mounting bar.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hat and scarf, with the hooks partially visible behind them.
